raw_title: Chiara Scotti: Programme for strengthening the central bank capacities in the Western Balkans with a view to the integration to the European System of Central Banks - Phase III
raw_content: Welcome address by Ms Chiara Scotti, Deputy Governor of the Bank of Italy, at the launch of the third EU-financed technical cooperation programme between the European System of Central Banks and central banks in the Western Balkans, Rome, 26 February 2026.
